semantic.role: API Handler for user creation, acting as an entry point that delegates to domain services.
responsibilities: Expose the CreateUserHandler class as the HTTP or application-layer entry point for creating new users.
Accept incoming request data (name, email) and delegate the business logic to UserService.
Establish a direct (but architecturally invalid) connection to the Database infrastructure for persistence operations.
outOfScope: Domain business logic and validation (handled by UserService).
Database schema or query execution details (handled by Database).
Routing or HTTP transport mechanics (not present in this file).
invariants: API layer must not directly import infrastructure modules (violated by Database import).
CreateUserHandler must always coordinate with UserService for user creation.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This file is part of an MVC-style demo project where the API handler orchestrates user creation by calling domain services and infrastructure. It was designed to illustrate both correct layering (domain import) and a deliberate violation (direct infra import).
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the ArchSpine v1.0.0 initial commit which sets up the architectural governance and semantic layer for AI-era tooling.

publicSurface.description: Application-layer handler for user creation. External callers instantiate this class and invoke its methods to create a user by delegating to UserService and Database.
